basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Assistant (PA) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Kanpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech., B.Sc., or equivalent degree in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, or a related discipline, with a strong academic record.
qualification.details: Project Assistant (PA): B.Tech., B.Sc., or equivalent degree in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, or a related discipline, with a strong academic record.

selection_process: Shortlisting Online Interview Joining upon selection
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant (PA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant (PA) position at IIT Kanpur is 10th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant (PA) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech., B.Sc., or an equivalent degree in disciplines such as Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Physics, or Mathematics, along with a strong academic record.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (PA) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant (PA) role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 32,400/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant (PA) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant (PA) position involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an online interview. Successful candidates will then be offered the position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job for the Project Assistant (PA) post?
faq.answer: The job for the Project Assistant (PA) position at IIT Kanpur is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Uttar Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. However, it's always best to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Project Assistant (PA) recruitment at IIT Kanpur is P.Rect./R&D/2026/138.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can click on the link to download and review the detailed notification.
